name: Ray Santos
abstract: Raymond Santos (December 28, 1928 – October 17, 2019) was an American Grammy Award-winning Latin musician, composer, and educator. Santos has played and arranged for such artists as Noro Morales, Machito, Tito Rodriguez, Eddie Palmieri, and Tito Puente among many others.

about_quotes.speaker: Wilson "Chembo" Corniel
about_quotes.evidence: You know we had Ray Santos who just passed away teaching at City College and teaching these young students the way to do a certain — and it’s easy but they don’t take the time out into studying our music in order for that to sound correct at a club date.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wilson "Chembo" Corniel interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, November 15, 2019
